title: Lykke Li – “Sick Of Love”
author: Tom Breihan
summary:
I’ve only been to Coachella once. It was way back in 2015, and I already felt like I was way too old to be there. One of the best sets I saw that weekend was Swedish alt-pop queen Lykke Li. I’d seen her a few times before that, but she really came off as a…

The post Lykke Li – “Sick Of Love” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
I've only been to Coachella once. It was way back in 2015, and I already felt like I was way too old to be there. One of the best sets I saw that weekend was Swedish alt-pop queen Lykke Li. I'd seen her a few times before that, but she really came off as a star that night. Eleven years later, Lykke Li is once again about to play Coachella, and I bet she'll kill it again. Maybe she'll sing the new song that she's got out today.

In one month, Lykke Li will release The Afterparty, which she says might be her last album. We've already posted her singles "Lucky Again" and "Knife In The Heart." Today, she shares "Sick Of Love," where she sings about being completely done with romance over what sounds like the "Hotline Bling" drums (speaking of 2015 Coachella artists with conflicted feelings about love). Check it out below.

The Afterparty is out 5/8 on Neon Gold Records/Futures✦.
